THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURRAY, MAURICE SUED AS MAURICE "DOE" THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 724 LEAVENWORTH ST, #H, STAYED UNTIL JAN-13-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS; PLTF. TO RETAIN SECURITY DEPOSIT; PLTFS. WAIVE RENT AND DAMAGES; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).

U.D. CASE, DEPT. 8 P/T JUDGE ART GROZA, RPT. M. HOLMES, CLK. R. CONTRERAS ATTY. FOR PLTF. JACQUELINE Y. WOODS DEFTS. IN PRO PER 2PM C/C FOR SETTLMNT. CONF. ALL PRESENT. WAIVE EXTENSION OF EVICTION. $900.00 RENT AND DAMAGES. EACH SIDE WIAVE ALL OTHER CLAIMS. PLTF. KEEP SECURITY DEPOSIT.
